creator: jimmy@mammothcheese.ca
text:
New diff:

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile ../munger/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/Makefile	Tue Apr 17 04:56:05 2007
+++ ../munger/Makefile	Wed Apr 18 11:28:04 2007
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
  #

  PORTNAME=	munger
-PORTVERSION=	4.125
+PORTVERSION=	4.126
  CATEGORIES=	lang
  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mammothcheese.ca/

diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo ../munger/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/distinfo	Tue Apr 17 04:56:05 2007
+++ ../munger/distinfo	Wed Apr 18 23:43:47 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (munger-4.125.tar.gz) = 0da0e4b617bd0a1aaf868fa8feb9c2be
-SHA256 (munger-4.125.tar.gz) = 
ed98fcbe1172dea8dcd5ddc0909ac0756b6ded5c1dfb5973d09d8fccdd4b02a1
-SIZE (munger-4.125.tar.gz) = 303662
+MD5 (munger-4.126.tar.gz) = 2331b9ffddc592cb722e566418944308
+SHA256 (munger-4.126.tar.gz) = 
67585ae4aa6a11c7e69677e6132f7ad5988cd9f430f85dfa1abfaad6cc7a6c29
+SIZE (munger-4.126.tar.gz) = 305461
diff -ruN /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-plist ../munger/pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/lang/munger/pkg-plist	Tue Apr 17 04:56:05 2007
+++ ../munger/pkg-plist	Wed Apr 18 12:02:22 2007
@@ -1,6 +1,8 @@
  bin/munger
-lib/libmunger.so.18
+lib/libmunger.so.19
  %%DKNS_BIN%%
+%%DATADIR%%/ipdatabase.munger
+%%DATADIR%%/ip2country.munger
  %%DATADIR%%/echo.munger
  %%DATADIR%%/msh.munger
  %%DATADIR%%/mbox2munger.munger
